# `aube dist-tag rm`

- **Usage**: `aube dist-tag rm [--otp <OTP>] <PACKAGE> <TAG>`
- **Aliases**: `remove`

Remove a dist-tag from a package

## Arguments

### `<PACKAGE>`

Package name (no version)

### `<TAG>`

Tag to remove

## Flags

### `--otp <OTP>`

One-time password from a 2FA authenticator; sent as `npm-otp`
